function.content:
---
record_type: invoice
invoice_number: INV-0009
alias: helios_discovery_invoice
issued_on: 2026-03-20
total_eur: 600
counterparty: Helios Steuerbüro München GmbH
project: Helios Workflow Sprint
related_entity: Claudia Reiter
lines:
  - item: workflow mapping and intake audit
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 420
    line_eur: 420
  - item: follow-up findings memo
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 180
    line_eur: 180
---
# Helios discovery and workflow mapping invoice

```text
+----------------+--------------------------------+
| field          | value                          |
+----------------+--------------------------------+
| record_type    | invoice                        |
| invoice_number | INV-0009                       |
| alias          | helios_discovery_invoice       |
| issued_on      | 2026-03-20                     |
| total_eur      | 600                            |
| counterparty   | Helios Steuerbüro München GmbH |
| project        | Helios Workflow Sprint         |
| related_entity | Claudia Reiter                 |
+----------------+--------------------------------+
```

## Line Items

```text
+---+-----------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| # | item                              | qty | unit_eur | line_eur |
+---+-----------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| 1 | workflow mapping and intake audit | 1   | 420      | 420      |
| 2 | follow-up findings memo           | 1   | 180      | 180      |
+---+-----------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
|   | TOTAL                             |     |          | 600      |
+---+-----------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
```

## Notes

Older consulting invoice that Miles would scan when the Helios lane becomes formal enough to track properly.

function.message: Processed the oldest inbox item by adding schema-compliant YAML frontmatter to the invoice note at 50_finance/invoices/2026_03_20__eur_000600__inv_0009__helios_discovery_invoice.md and then deleting the processed inbox file 00_inbox/000_next-task.md.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed bootstrap requirements, inspected 99_system, read inbox-processing and migration workflows, followed finance lane rules, preserved the original invoice body, kept the diff focused, and deleted the inbox item only after successful completion.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request in 00_inbox/000_next-task.md asked for OCR-style extraction into YAML frontmatter for the invoice record. The target invoice note visibly contained all required invoice schema fields and line items needed by 99_system/schemas/finance-record-frontmatter.md, so the note could be updated exactly without guessing. After successful update, deletion of the processed inbox item was required by 00_inbox/AGENTS.MD and 99_system/workflows/process-next-inbox-item.md.
